title: Tifuly 24 Pcs Artificial Calla Lilies, Realistic Latex Calla Lily with Soft PU Stem, Elegant Flower Decoration for Bridal Wedding, Home, Party, Office, DIY Floral Arrangements(Pink)
features: 【Size】: Height approx 13.77 inch/ 35cm, flower head 1.97 inch/ 5cm (width),the vase is not included.
【Material】: NO SMELL latex (real touch) flower heads, soft PU covered flexible iron wire as stems, they are glued firmly together, stems can be bent and trimmed.

【Pack of 24】: 1 Lot included 24 pieces artificial single stem calla lilies, single stem flowers are easy to make centerpieces, DIY some floral arrangements, wedding bouquets, door wreaths,etc. matching with roses, tulips, pompon mum flowers, babys' breath, hydrangeas are perfect choices.if want more flowers effect, please order 2 lots or more.

【Perfect for Any Scenes】: With special artistic elegant looking and vibrant color, they are perfect for any scenes, such as home, wedding, office, party, hotel, shop, restaurant, opening ceremony, event planner, etc. artificial calla lilies maintain the beauty of fresh flowers, but they are cheaper and last longer life time than fresh flowers. welcome to add a touch of color and romance to your home.
【Customer Service】: Tifuly provides 100% money back service + 3 months warranty, any question or suggestion welcome to contact with us from Amazon message center.
description: Product Description Smooth latex flower head surface. Size: Height approx 13.77 inch/ 35cm, flower head 1.97 inch/ 5cm (width),since the sizes are measured by hand,so the measurement is allowed 0.5~2 cm error. Soft PU green stem. Package: 24 Pcs artificial single stem calla lilies in bulk.( the vase is not included ). Flexible stem can be easily bent or trimmed. Tifuly is committed to maintain the highest standard of quality to our customers, welcome to our products page to find more beautiful flowers, plants, vines,etc Popular Colors (Due to the different computer monitors, the pictures and objects may have some slight differences,please refer to the real subject) Pure White White Petal + Yellow Core Light Pink Yellow Light Blue Royal Blue Sunset Red White + Yellow How to maintain these flowers? Answer: There maybe some accumulated dust after putting them in a place for a long time, please use hair dryer with cold wind to remove the dust.we're not suggest that soaking them in water to clean them, it may cause some damage to the surface of latex flowers.
